personaSearch.placeholder: Sesha ngegama, okukhethekile, noma chaza izimpawu zakho (isb., ikhanda elibuhlungu, ukukhathazeka)
personaSearch.searchSuggestions: Zama ukusesha: ikhanda, ukukhathazeka, ubuhlungu, ukulala, isifo sikashukela, njll.

configurator.title: Qala Ukubonisana Okusha Kwezempilo
configurator.subtitle: Khetha Eqenjini lakho Lezempilo le-AI
configurator.noOtherSpecialists: Abekho abanye ochwepheshe eqenjini lakho. Ungaxoxa ne-AI Health Expert Carol noma

carolNote.title: Inothi ngokubamba iqhaza kwe-AI Health Expert Carol:
carolNote.ruleA: A. Isazi Sezempilo se-AI uCarol sifakiwe uma kukhethwa abanye ochwepheshe abangu-0 noma abangu-2+ eqenjini lakho.
carolNote.ruleB: B. Isazi Sezempilo se-AI uCarol asifakiwe uma kukhethwa omunye uchwepheshe ongu-1 eqenjini lakho.

conversations.deleteConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa le ngxoxo?

team.addTeamMembersInstruction: Engeza amalungu eqembu ngokuchofoza ekhadini elingakwesokudla.
team.maxTeamSizeNote: Ubuningi babeluleki be-AI abahlanu bungangezwa eqenjini lakho. Ungashintsha iqembu lakho noma kunini, kodwa hhayi ngesikhathi sokubonisana.
team.manageTeamTitle: Phatha Ithimba Lami Lezempilo le-AI (Ochwepheshe Abaphezulu {{max}})
team.removeSpecialistToUseTeamBuilder: Sicela ususe okungenani uchwepheshe oyedwa ukuze usebenzise izincomo zokwakha zethimba le-AI Expert Carol
team.aileenCarolRecommendTeam: Yiba ne-AI Health Expert Carol incoma ithimba lakho lezempilo
team.teamFullRemoveToUseBuilder: Ithimba lakho ligcwele. Sicela ususe okungenani uchwepheshe oyedwa ukuze usebenzise isakhiwo seqembu se-AI.
team.teamEmptyAddBelow: Ithimba lakho lochwepheshe alinalutho. Engeza ochwepheshe ngezansi.
team.teamFullRemoveMember: Ithimba lakho ligcwele (Ubuningi bochwepheshe abangu-{{max}}). Sicela ususe ilungu uma ungathanda ukwengeza uchwepheshe ohlukile.
team.addMembersClickCard: Engeza amalungu eqembu ngokuchofoza ikhadi endaweni eyinhloko
team.noMatchingSpecialists: Abekho ochwepheshe abafanayo abatholelwe izincomo ze-AI. Ungazama futhi noma wakhe ithimba lakho mathupha.
team.medicalDisclaimerText: Le nkundla inikeza iseluleko sezempilo nesiqondiso kodwa ayikwazi ukuthatha indawo yokunakekelwa kwezempilo okuchwepheshile. Hlala uthintana nochwepheshe bezokunakekelwa kwempilo abaqeqeshiwe mayelana nezimo eziphuthumayo noma izinkinga zempilo ezingathi sína.
team.clickToAddInstruction: Chofoza ikhadi ukuze ungeze eqenjini lakho ({{current}}/{{max}} ekhethiwe). Ochwepheshe abakhethiwe babonisa ibheji "Ekhethiwe".
team.teamFullInstruction: Ithimba lakho ligcwele. Susa ilungu ukuze ungeze uchwepheshe ohlukile.
team.allSpecialistsAdded: Bonke ochwepheshe abakhona bengeziwe eqenjini lakho.
team.addMembersInstruction: Engeza amalungu eqembu ngokuchofoza ekhadini elingakwesokudla.

dialogs.exitMessage: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuphuma kulokhu kuxoxisana?
dialogs.logoutMessage: Okwamanje usekubonisaneni. Ukuphuma ngemvume kuzokuqeda. Ungathanda ukwenzani?
dialogs.doneAlreadyMessage: Sikhona noma nini lapho usidinga. Kuze kube yileso sikhathi, yiba nempilo, ujabule!
dialogs.deleteConfirmation: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa ingxoxo enesihloko esithi "{{title}}"?
dialogs.multiDeleteConfirmation: Ingabe uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa izingxoxo ezikhethiwe ezingu-{{count}}? Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuhlehliswa.
dialogs.noAdvisersToAdd: Bonke abeluleki bakho bezempilo be-AI abakhethiwe sebevele bekule ngxoxo, noma uhlu lwakho alunalutho (ngaphandle kwabahlanganyeli bamanje).

longRecording.title: Ukurekhoda Okude Kumiswe Isikhashana
longRecording.message: Asikwazi ukurekhoda ngaphezu kwamasekhondi angu-30 ngaphandle kokuyithumela. Ungathanda ukwenzani?

dialogs.generatingSummary: Sicela ulinde ngenkathi senza isifinyezo sakho sokubonisana...
dialogs.finishConsultationMessage: Lokhu kuzoqeda iseshini yengxoxo esebenzayo. Uqinisekile?
dialogs.moreInfoMessage: Le ngxoxo yimfushane kakhulu ukukhiqiza isifinyezo esizwakalayo noma umbono ohlukile. Sicela uqhubeke nengxoxo uze ube namagama okungenani ayi-150 okuqukethwe kwengxoxo.
dialogs.aiHealthSpecialist: Uchwepheshe wakho oyinhloko we-AI wezempilo nokuphila kahle

shortConv.title: Ingxoxo Iphelile
shortConv.messageLine1: Ingxoxo isiphelile. Lifushane kakhulu ukuthi ungaligcina, kodwa woza futhi maduze.
shortConv.messageLine2: Kuze kube yileso sikhathi, yiba nempilo, ujabule.

errors.connectionError: Iphutha lokuxhuma. Sicela uhlole uxhumano lwakho lwe-inthanethi.
errors.serverError: Iphutha leseva. Sicela uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi.
errors.authenticationError: Ukuqinisekisa kuhlulekile. Sicela ungene ngemvume futhi.
errors.emailAlreadyTaken: Le imeyili isivele ithathiwe. Sicela uzame enye noma ngena ngemvume.
errors.failedToSaveProfile: Yehlulekile ukulondoloza iphrofayela. Sicela uzame futhi.
errors.teamIsFull: Ithimba lakho ligcwele (Ubuningi bochwepheshe abangu-{{max}}). Sicela ususe ilungu uma ungathanda ukwengeza uchwepheshe ohlukile.
errors.selectOneSpecialist: Sicela ukhethe uchwepheshe oyedwa kuphela ukuze uthole ukubonisana okuyimfihlo.
errors.contactErrorMessage: Kwenzeke iphutha ngenkathi kuthunyelwa umlayezo wakho. Sicela uzame futhi emuva kwesikhathi noma
errors.contactDirectlyAt: Ungase futhi usithumele i-imeyili ngokuqondile ku-info@virtualmd.app

welcome.title: Siyakwamukela ku-VirtualMD.app
welcome.subtitle: Qala ukubonisana kwakho kwezempilo komuntu siqu
welcome.description: Khetha eqenjini lethu labeluleki bezempilo abaxhaswe yi-AI ukuze uthole imininingwane yomuntu siqu yezempilo kanye nesiqondiso.
welcome.greeting: Sawubona, {{username}}. Kuhle kakhulu ukukubona! Ithimba lakho le-VirtualMD likulungele 24/7 ukusiza...
welcome.aileenCarolIntro: Sawubona, nginguchwepheshe we-AI Wezempilo u-Aileen Carol. Ngingakusiza ngani namuhla?
welcome.persona_welcome_message: Sawubona, ngilapha ukuze ngikusize ngezidingo zakho zempilo nempilo. Ngingakusiza kanjani namuhla?

imageUpload.dragAndDrop: Hudula bese udedela izithombe lapha, noma chofoza ukuze ukhethe

carolMessages.teamFull: {{name}}, ithimba lakho ligcwele! Ungaqala ukubonisana nethimba lakho lamanje noma ususe amalungu athile ukuze uthole izincomo ezintsha.
carolMessages.helpBuild: {{name}}, ngingathanda ukukusiza ukuthi wakhe ithimba lakho lezempilo eliphelele! Ngitshele ukuthi yini ekulethela lapha namuhla.

carolGreeting.helpBuild: Sawubona {{igama}}! Ngizokusiza ukwakha ithimba lakho lezempilo eliphelele.

mobileTeamBuilder.tellUsWhy: Sitshele ukuthi kungani ulapha namuhla ukuze sikwazi ukudala ithimba lakho lezempilo eliphelele.
mobileTeamBuilder.placeholder: Chaza okukukhathazayo ngempilo, izimpawu, noma ukuthi yini ongathanda ukusizwa ngayo...

fileUpload.clickToUpload: Chofoza ukuze ulayishe ifayela (Ungabeka amafayela nasengxoxweni)

profile.healthInfoTooltip: Sicela ubhale noma wenze uhlu lwemithi, izifo, izithasiselo nezinye izinto ezibalulekile ezihlobene nempilo ngawe.
profile.healthInfoPlaceholder: Faka ohlwini imithi, izifo, izithasiselo, njll.

imageContext.cropPromotionError: Yehlulekile ukuthumela nokwengeza isithombe esondeziwe. Hlola ikhonsoli.
imageContext.noActiveZoom: Akukho ukusondeza okusebenzayo okungathunyelwa. Sicela ukhethe indawo esithombeni.
imageContext.functionsUnavailable: Ayikwazi ukuthumela ukusondeza: Imisebenzi ebalulekile ayitholakali.
imageContext.noImages: Azikho izithombe kumongo. Layisha isithombe ukuze uqale.
imageContext.allHidden: Zonke izithombe zifihliwe okwamanje. Chofoza isithonjana kunhlokweni ukuze ubonise isithombe.
imageContext.dragToZoom: Chofoza bese uhudula isithombe esingenhla ukuze ukhethe indawo yokusondeza entsha.

mobileWelcome.aileenCarolIntro: Ngingu-AI Aileen Carol, uchwepheshe wakho wezempilo oyinhloko. Ngibheke ngabomvu ukukwazi. Ngiphethe ithimba lakho le-VirtualMD.app AI lochwepheshe bezempilo. Silungele ukusiza 24/7...
mobileWelcome.aiTeamBuilder: Isazi sezempilo se-AI uCarol sikusiza ukuthi ukhethe iqembu lakho

sidebarHeader.aileenCarolTeamBuilder: Uchwepheshe Wezempilo uCarol usiza ukwakha iqembu lakho.

encyclopedia.title: I-VirtualMD.app Encyclopedia
encyclopedia.loadingMessage: Sikwenzela ucwaningo olujulile ngalesi sihloko. Sicela ulinde imizuzwana embalwa ukuze uthole impendulo yakho.
encyclopedia.longWaitMessage: Lokhu kungathatha imizuzu embalwa ukuthola izimpendulo ezinemininingwane.
encyclopedia.emptyState: Faka umbuzo ngenhla ukuze useshe i-VirtualMD.app Encyclopedia.

input.typeOrSpeakPlaceholder:
Thayipha noma ukhulume umlayezo wakho...
Cindezela u-Enter noma chofoza u-▷ ukuze uthumele.
input.typePlaceholder:
Thayipha umlayezo lapha...
Cindezela u-Enter noma chofoza u-▷ ukuze uthumele.
input.startTypingMessage: Qala ukuthayipha umlayezo wakho ebhokisini elingezansi ukuze uqale ukubonisana kwakho.

quickActions.whatShouldIDo: Ngokusekelwe kukho konke esixoxile ngakho, yini okufanele ngiyenze manje? Sicela unikeze izincomo ezicacile, ezingasetshenzwa.
quickActions.requestSummary: Sicela unikeze isifinyezo esibanzi sengxoxo yethu kuze kube manje, okuhlanganisa amaphuzu abalulekile okukhulunywe ngawo, izincomo ezenziwe, nezinyathelo ezilandelayo.

camera.accessDenied: Ukufinyelela kwekhamera kunqatshiwe. Sicela uvumele ukufinyelela kwekhamera kuzilungiselelo zesiphequluli sakho.

specialistPanel.guidanceSingle: Khetha Uchwepheshe oyedwa we-AI ukuze uthole ukubonisana okuyimfihlo:
specialistPanel.guidanceMulti: Uchwepheshe wezempilo we-AI uCarol uzohlala efakiwe. Khetha abeluleki bezempilo be-AI abengeziwe:
specialistPanel.warningSelectOne: Sicela ukhethe uchwepheshe oyedwa kuphela ukuze uthole ukubonisana okuyimfihlo.
specialistPanel.noSpecialistsAvailable: Abekho ochwepheshe be-AI okwamanje abatholakalayo ukuze kukhulunywe nabo ngasese.
specialistPanel.noAdvisersAvailable: Abekho abeluleki bezempilo abengeziwe be-AI abatholakalayo.

sidebarFooter.disclaimerText: I-VirtualMD.app ilwela ukunemba. Nokho, lokhu kanye nanoma iyiphi insizakalo esekwe ku-AI inganikeza ulwazi olungalungile. Hlala uthintana nochwepheshe bezempilo bomuntu oqeqeshiwe.

account.title: Amasethingi we-akhawunti
account.description: Kusuka lapha ungasusa unomphela i-akhawunti yakho ye-VirtualMD.app. Lesi senzo sisusa iphrofayela yakho nakho konke ukubonisana.
account.confirmDeleteText: Lesi senzo asinakuhlehliswa. Lonke ulwazi lwephrofayela yakho, ukubonisana, namafayela kuzosuswa unomphela. Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuqhubeka?

mobileRouter.logInToView: Ngena ngemvume ukuze ubuke izingxoxo zakho noma uqale entsha.

chat.logInToView: Ngena ngemvume ukuze ubuke izingxoxo zakho noma uqale entsha.

child.title: Ingane yami iyagula
child.subtitle: Ukunakekelwa kwezingane okuchwepheshile lapho ukudinga kakhulu
child.initialMessage: Ngingu-AI Aileen Carol, Umeluleki wakho Wezempilo Obonakalayo. Ngiyazi ukuthi ingane egulayo ikhathazeka kangakanani. Ngitshele ukuthi kwenzakalani.  Qaphela: Ngiyi-AI, hhayi umuntu; iseluleko sami singase asilungile—qinisekisa ngochwepheshe bezempilo bomuntu abaqeqeshiwe.

sleep.title: Angikwazi ukulala!
sleep.subtitle: Buyisela ubusuku bakho, uguqule izinsuku zakho
sleep.initialMessage: Ngingu-AI Aileen Carol, Umeluleki wakho Wezempilo Obonakalayo, onochwepheshe bokulala u-AIS Benjamin Stein (wengqondo) kanye no-AI Alice Chen (Neurology). Yabelana ngezinselele zakho zokulala ukuze sikusize. Qaphela: Singama-AIS, hhayi abantu; iseluleko sethu singase singalungile—qinisekisa ngochwepheshe (ongumuntu) wezempilo oqeqeshiwe.

nutrition.title: Umsoco wokuphila
nutrition.subtitle: Thuthukisa amandla akho, ukuphila kahle, nempilo yezocansi ngokudla
nutrition.initialMessage: Ngingu-AI Aileen Carol, Umeluleki wakho Wezempilo Obonakalayo, lapha nethimba lakho - AI Angelica Fordham (ukudla okunomsoco), Ukwelapha Ngocansi AI Rachel Levy, kanye no-AI African Herbalist u-Amina Okufur. Uzizwa unjani namuhla? Qaphela: Siyi-AI, hhayi abantu; iseluleko singase singalungile—qinisekisa ngochwepheshe bezempilo abaqeqeshiwe.

uploadFeatures.title: Izici Zokulayishwa Kwedokhumenti Nezithombe
uploadFeatures.description: Inkundla yethu inikezela ngamakhono anamandla okuhlaziya amadokhumenti nezithombe lapho ungakwazi khona:
uploadFeatures.benefit1: Layisha amadokhumenti ezempilo, imibiko yelebhu, nezithombe
uploadFeatures.benefit2: Sondeza eduze ezindaweni ezithile ukuze uthole ukuhlaziya okuningiliziwe
uploadFeatures.benefit3: Cela abeluleki bethu bezempilo be-AI ukuthi bahlole futhi baxoxe ngamadokhumenti akho
uploadFeatures.benefit4: Thatha izithombe ngqo kwikhamera yakho ukuze nibonisane ngokushesha
uploadFeatures.registeredOnly: Lezi zici ezikhethekile ziyatholakala kubasebenzisi ababhalisiwe.
